description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm install, caches the node_modules/ directory, and stores node_modules/ as an artifact that expires in 1 week, and runs on runners tagged docker and shared. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm test using the same node:8 image and also runs on runners tagged docker and shared.
